Amount of [[Immanuelle]]'s revelation
==Text==
Then in my third to Germany Omega was revealed to me when I went to the tomb of Charlemagne and saw baby Jesus there, and misread a description of an artifact "Madonna and child Charlemagne" as Charlemagne being baby Jesus (really he was just on a part of the artifact I didn't see and a comma was missing), and then I had a dream where I was reliving my entire life with the Virgin Mary as my mother caring for me as my biological mother was neglecting me. And I woke up and saw the Chi Rho with Alpha and Omega and realized that whenever I'm being compassionate to others I'm being compassionate to myself (and that I'm a God), and I called this compassion the Greatest Grandson who will be the common descendant of all of us (Omega of Omegas)

[[Category:Omega Pilgrimage]]
[[Category:12021]]
[[Category:Revelations]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
